message:
test(e2e): Add network resilience and offline mode E2E tests

Added comprehensive E2E test suite for network handling:

- e2e/network/offline.spec.ts:
  - Offline indicator visibility tests
  - Banner dismissal functionality
  - Page behavior while offline

- e2e/network/failures.spec.ts:
  - API request failure handling
  - Request retry behavior
  - Static asset failure resilience
  - User actions during network issues

- e2e/network/slow.spec.ts:
  - Loading state display
  - Page interactivity during slow loads
  - Timeout handling
  - Text-first rendering (images don't block content)

- e2e/network/reconnection.spec.ts:
  - Offline indicator state transitions
  - Multiple offline/online cycle handling
  - Content persistence through reconnection
  - User actions after reconnection (basket, copy)

Tests use Playwright's context.setOffline() and route interception
to simulate various network conditions.

Closes: jeffreysprompts.com-rhvk

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
